title: Develop a water quality monitoring program
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Develop a water quality monitoring program demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Determine water quality monitoring program requirements

pcs.text: Consult with client to identify scope, objectives and constraints in a program brief
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Consult with client to identify scope, objectives and constraints in a program brief?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Consult with client to identify scope, objectives and constraints in a program brief.

pcs.text: Research and evaluate background information relevant to survey type and site
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Research and evaluate background information relevant to survey type and site?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Research and evaluate background information relevant to survey type and site.

pcs.text: Determine water quality indicators to be measured, frequency and volume of sampling required to meet program brief
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Determine water quality indicators to be measured, frequency and volume of sampling required to meet program brief?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine water quality indicators to be measured, frequency and volume of sampling required to meet program brief.

pcs.text: Establish procedures for data collection, processing and reporting according to program brief and legislative requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Establish procedures for data collection, processing and reporting according to program brief and legislative requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Establish procedures for data collection, processing and reporting according to program brief and legislative requirements.

pcs.text: Seek estimates of costs and source of funds for the program
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Seek estimates of costs and source of funds for the program?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Seek estimates of costs and source of funds for the program.

pcs.text: Identify and assess workplace health and safety hazards for conducting the sampling program
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify and assess workplace health and safety hazards for conducting the sampling program?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and assess workplace health and safety hazards for conducting the sampling program.

pcs.text: Provide a survey strategy to stakeholders for discussion and approvals according to program brief
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Provide a survey strategy to stakeholders for discussion and approvals according to program brief?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Provide a survey strategy to stakeholders for discussion and approvals according to program brief.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Determine water quality monitoring program requirements

elements.title: Undertake a site analysis

pcs.text: Identify and record biophysical elements of the site
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify and record biophysical elements of the site?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and record biophysical elements of the site.

pcs.text: Identify and record resource management factors contributing to water quality
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify and record resource management factors contributing to water quality?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and record resource management factors contributing to water quality.

pcs.text: Survey site biota according to program brief
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Survey site biota according to program brief?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Survey site biota according to program brief.

pcs.text: Identify and evaluate sampling points for safety, accessibility and opportunities for repeatable data collection
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify and evaluate sampling points for safety, accessibility and opportunities for repeatable data collection?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and evaluate sampling points for safety, accessibility and opportunities for repeatable data collection.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Undertake a site analysis

elements.title: Plan monitoring program

pcs.text: Select suitable sites for repeatable monitoring to obtain representative samples
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Select suitable sites for repeatable monitoring to obtain representative samples?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select suitable sites for repeatable monitoring to obtain representative samples.

pcs.text: Source laboratory and field equipment for monitoring program, and determine costs
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Source laboratory and field equipment for monitoring program, and determine costs?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Source laboratory and field equipment for monitoring program, and determine costs.

pcs.text: Confirm suitability and availability of laboratory and field equipment
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Confirm suitability and availability of laboratory and field equipment?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Confirm suitability and availability of laboratory and field equipment.

pcs.text: Confirm surveyor access to site for duration of the monitoring program
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Confirm surveyor access to site for duration of the monitoring program?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Confirm surveyor access to site for duration of the monitoring program.

pcs.text: Document workplace health and safety controls and emergency procedures for the program according to workplace policies
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Document workplace health and safety controls and emergency procedures for the program according to workplace policies?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Document workplace health and safety controls and emergency procedures for the program according to workplace policies.

pcs.text: Document environmental sustainability policies and procedures and biosecurity measures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Document environmental sustainability policies and procedures and biosecurity measures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Document environmental sustainability policies and procedures and biosecurity measures.

pcs.text: Document sampling techniques to be used
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Document sampling techniques to be used?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Document sampling techniques to be used.

pcs.text: Document methods of data collection, monitoring and field techniques for field operators
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Document methods of data collection, monitoring and field techniques for field operators?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Document methods of data collection, monitoring and field techniques for field operators.

pcs.text: Present survey schedules and procedures to stakeholders and client for approval
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Present survey schedules and procedures to stakeholders and client for approval?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Present survey schedules and procedures to stakeholders and client for approval.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E3: Plan monitoring program

elements.title: Monitor water quality

pcs.text: Carry out water quality monitoring tasks according to plan
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Carry out water quality monitoring tasks according to plan?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Carry out water quality monitoring tasks according to plan.

pcs.text: Transport, store and treat samples to preserve the reliability and fidelity of sample results
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Transport, store and treat samples to preserve the reliability and fidelity of sample results?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Transport, store and treat samples to preserve the reliability and fidelity of sample results.

pcs.text: Monitor surveying process for accuracy, and compliance with the survey plans and procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Monitor surveying process for accuracy, and compliance with the survey plans and procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Monitor surveying process for accuracy, and compliance with the survey plans and procedures.

pcs.text: Implement contingency plans when problems arise, whilst continuously assessing and evaluating the plan for errors and inconsistencies
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Implement contingency plans when problems arise, whilst continuously assessing and evaluating the plan for errors and inconsistencies?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Implement contingency plans when problems arise, whilst continuously assessing and evaluating the plan for errors and inconsistencies.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E4: Monitor water quality

elements.title: Evaluate program

pcs.text: Record and save data according to plan requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Record and save data according to plan requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Record and save data according to plan requirements.

pcs.text: Analyse data collected according to industry policies and guidelines and scientific standards
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Analyse data collected according to industry policies and guidelines and scientific standards?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Analyse data collected according to industry policies and guidelines and scientific standards.

pcs.text: Draw outcomes, conclusions or trends from the monitoring program using industry standards for interpretation of water quality data and appropriate evidence and reasoned arguments
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Draw outcomes, conclusions or trends from the monitoring program using industry standards for interpretation of water quality data and appropriate evidence and reasoned arguments?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Draw outcomes, conclusions or trends from the monitoring program using industry standards for interpretation of water quality data and appropriate evidence and reasoned arguments.

pcs.text: Seek advice from client as to satisfaction with monitoring program in terms of the process and outcomes
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Seek advice from client as to satisfaction with monitoring program in terms of the process and outcomes?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Seek advice from client as to satisfaction with monitoring program in terms of the process and outcomes.

pcs.text: Provide report on outcomes to client with recommendations for changes and improvements for any further monitoring activities
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Provide report on outcomes to client with recommendations for changes and improvements for any further monitoring activities?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Provide report on outcomes to client with recommendations for changes and improvements for any further monitoring activities.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E5: Evaluate program
